implementationRules: Read memory before starting next group

taskLog.message: Group 1 Core SEO Orchestration implemented with trigger system, command registry, memory system, README update, MCP foundation, CLI foundation, rule engine, priority engine, and score engine.

Group 2 Technical SEO implemented with search essentials, spam policy, crawlability, indexability, robots.txt, meta robots, X-Robots-Tag, sitemap, URL structure, canonicalization, redirects, status code checks, /seo-master technical-audit command, MCP technical audit tool, README update, and tests.

Group 3 Performance SEO implemented with Core Web Vitals, LCP, INP, CLS, TTFB, image performance, font performance, JavaScript performance, CSS performance, third-party script checks, /seo-master performance-audit command, MCP performance audit tool, README update, and tests.

Group 4 On-Page SEO implemented with title tag, meta description, heading structure, H1-H6 hierarchy, content structure, above-the-fold SEO, CTA/conversion checks, image alt checks, on-page link checks, /seo-master on-page-audit command, MCP on-page audit tool, README update, and tests.

Group 5 Keyword Research & Intent implemented with keyword research, clustering, search intent detection, difficulty mapping, funnel-stage mapping, keyword-to-page mapping, cannibalization risk detection, opportunity prioritization, /seo-master keyword-research command, MCP keyword research tool, README update, and tests.

Group 6 Content Strategy & Planning implemented with content planning, topic clusters, pillar page planning, supporting content planning, content briefs, gap detection, refresh planning, pruning logic, content calendar, content quality guard, /seo-master content-plan command, MCP content plan tool, README update, and tests.

Group 7 Site Architecture & Internal Linking implemented with site architecture, URL hierarchy, navigation structure, crawl depth approximation, orphan page detection, internal linking, anchor text checks, breadcrumb checks, topic cluster linking, link equity recommendations, /seo-master architecture-audit and /seo-master internal-linking-audit commands, MCP tools, README update, and tests.

Group 8 Schema & Entity SEO implemented with schema selection, validation, rich result eligibility guard, entity SEO, Organization, WebSite, BreadcrumbList, Article, Product, Service, SoftwareApplication, LocalBusiness, FAQPage guard, VideoObject, JobPosting, sameAs/entity relationships, /seo-master schema-audit and /seo-master schema-generate commands, MCP tools, README update, and tests.

Group 9 Media SEO implemented with media audit, image SEO, alt text checks, filename checks, image format/compression checks, responsive image checks, Open Graph image checks, image sitemap recommendations, video SEO, transcripts/captions, thumbnails, VideoObject schema support, video sitemap recommendations, media accessibility, media performance guard, /seo-master media-audit, /seo-master image-seo-audit, /seo-master video-seo-audit commands, MCP tools, README update, and tests.

Group 10 Ecommerce SEO implemented with ecommerce audit, category SEO, product SEO, product variant handling, review/rating guard, Product schema guard, category content quality, faceted navigation, filter/parameter SEO, pagination SEO, out-of-stock/discontinued handling, ecommerce internal linking, trust policy checks, Merchant feed readiness, /seo-master ecommerce-seo, /seo-master ecommerce-audit, /seo-master product-seo-audit, /seo-master category-seo-audit commands, MCP tools, README update, and tests.

Group 11 Local & International SEO implemented with local SEO audit, Google Business Profile readiness, NAP consistency, local landing page checks, LocalBusiness schema guard, review authenticity guard, citation readiness, service-area SEO, multi-location SEO, international SEO audit, hreflang checks, language/country targeting, x-default checks, localized content quality, international URL structure checks, /seo-master local-seo, /seo-master local-seo-audit, /seo-master international-seo, /seo-master international-seo-audit, /seo-master hreflang-audit commands, MCP tools, README update, and tests.

Group 12 AI Search & Discover SEO implemented with AI Search readiness, generative search content checks, answer blocks, conversational query coverage, snippet eligibility guard, entity clarity, information gain, source/citation quality, content extractability, AI-generated content quality guard, Google Discover readiness, news/publisher readiness, large image preview guard, title/thumbnail guard, /seo-master ai-search-readiness, /seo-master ai-search-audit, /seo-master answer-block-audit, /seo-master discover-seo-audit, /seo-master ai-content-quality-audit commands, MCP tools, README update, and tests.

Group 13 Trust, Security & Accessibility implemented with trust audit, E-E-A-T audit, author/reviewer trust, organization trust, contact transparency, trust pages, testimonial/review authenticity guard, legal policy readiness, security audit, HTTPS/mixed content guard, malware/hacked content guard, form trust/safety, accessibility audit, semantic HTML, heading accessibility, image alt accessibility, form accessibility, keyboard navigation, contrast/readability checks, /seo-master trust-audit, /seo-master eeat-audit, /seo-master security-audit, /seo-master accessibility-audit commands, MCP tools, README update, and tests.

Group 14 CMS & Framework SEO implemented with CMS/framework audit, WordPress SEO, permalink checks, archive/attachment indexing checks, SEO plugin conflict guard, WordPress theme performance guard, React SEO, Next.js SEO, static website SEO, SPA risk guard, SSR/SSG readiness, dynamic metadata, route-level SEO, sitemap/robots/canonical generation guards, Open Graph/social metadata guard, JSON-LD rendering guard, framework build validation, /seo-master framework-seo-audit, /seo-master wordpress-seo-audit, /seo-master react-seo-audit, /seo-master nextjs-seo-audit, /seo-master static-seo-audit, /seo-master build-seo-check commands, MCP tools, README update, and tests.

Group 15 Website Audit implemented with full website audit, page-level audit, template-level audit, technical/performance/on-page/content/architecture/schema/media/ecommerce/local-international/AI-discover/trust-security-accessibility/CMS-framework aggregators, issue deduplication, priority normalization, website SEO score, audit roadmap, /seo-master audit-website, /seo-master website-audit, /seo-master full-audit, /seo-master page-audit commands, MCP tools, README update, and tests.

Group 16 Competitor Analysis implemented with competitor type detection, SERP analysis, keyword gap, content gap, backlink gap, page structure comparison, metadata comparison, schema comparison, internal linking signals, UX/conversion signals, SERP feature opportunities, positioning analysis, opportunity prioritization, /seo-master competitor-analysis, /seo-master competitor-audit, /seo-master competitor-keyword-gap, /seo-master competitor-content-gap, /seo-master competitor-backlink-gap, /seo-master serp-analysis commands, MCP tools, README update, and tests.

Group 17 SEO Strategy & Campaign Planning implemented with SEO strategy, SEO plan generator, campaign planning, goal mapping, business goal mapping, opportunity prioritization, impact-effort matrix, 30/60/90 roadmap, technical/content/authority/conversion roadmaps, launch checklist, migration plan, resource planning, SEO risk planning, /seo-master seo-plan, /seo-master seo-strategy, /seo-master seo-campaign-plan, /seo-master opportunity-plan, /seo-master launch-checklist, /seo-master migration-plan commands, MCP tools, README update, and tests.
